claimText: LMU teaching guidance recommends adapting e-exam questions for ChatGPT-era assessment, including tasks that require critical reflection on ChatGPT limitations rather than simple knowledge or comprehension questions.
normalizedValue: Teaching handout recommends adapting e-exam question formats around ChatGPT limitations
